meta.title: tetra-tools.com — Assistive Devices for Tetraplegics
meta.description: Specialized assistive devices for people with tetraplegia: catheter insertion aid, typing aid, Tetra tongs, and more.

hero.label: Assistive Devices for Tetraplegics
hero.title: More Independence
hero.description: We develop and manufacture practical assistive devices that give people with tetraplegia greater independence in everyday life — from catheter aids to the Tetra tongs.

intro.title: Why tetra-tools?
intro.text1: Our assistive devices are born from lived experience. As people with tetraplegia ourselves, we know what truly matters in daily life — and we build solutions that work.
intro.text2: All products are manufactured in Germany and can be individually customized. If you're interested, please contact us via email.

features.title: By Tetraplegics, for Tetraplegics
features.description: Developed from lived experience — we know the challenges of everyday life.

features.title: Made in Germany
features.description: All products are carefully manufactured in Germany.

features.title: Patented Technologies
features.description: Our own patents protect our innovative solutions.

features.title: Individual Customization
features.description: Every device can be adapted to personal needs.

items.title: Catheter Insertion Aid
items.shortDescription: Ergonomic aid for independent catheter insertion.
items.description: The catheter insertion aid was specifically developed for people with limited hand function. It enables independent and safe catheterization through an ergonomically shaped grip and a well-designed guide. The device is easy to clean and made from durable, medically safe materials.

items.title: Keyboard Typing Aid
items.shortDescription: Universal typing aid for computer and laptop keyboards.
items.description: The typing aid enables people with tetraplegia to type independently on a standard keyboard. The special mounting securely attaches the device to the hand and allows precise keystrokes. Suitable for all common keyboards and laptops.

items.title: Tetra Tongs
items.shortDescription: Patented gripping aid — versatile for everyday use.
items.description: The Tetra Tongs are a patented gripping aid specifically developed for the needs of people with tetraplegia. They enable gripping, holding, and manipulating various objects in daily life. From the kitchen to the office — the Tetra Tongs are a versatile companion.

items.title: Catheter Hooks
items.shortDescription: Various hook variants to facilitate catheterization.
items.description: Our catheter hook series offers various specialized hook solutions that make catheterization easier. Each variant is optimized for different applications and is made from high-quality, hygienic materials. The hooks can be individually adapted to the user's needs.

contact.title: Interested?
contact.description: Contact us via email to learn more about our products or to make an inquiry. We're happy to advise you individually.

impressum.title: Legal Notice
impressum.disclaimerContent: The contents of this website are created with the greatest possible care. However, the provider assumes no liability for the correctness, completeness, and timeliness of the provided content.
